name: sparra
description: Conduct Sparra's adversarial cross-model build and evaluation loop from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Conduct one-off evaluations, interactive cross-model loops, and stepped autonomous builds through Sparra's holdout-safe runner.
defaultPrompt: Evaluate my current work once against its contract with a different model.
Run an interactive cross-model generate, evaluate, and decide loop for this work item.
Guide this project through a checkpointed sparra build --step=contract,round,commit,item run.
